title: Pan Aroma Midnight Jasmine & Soft Cotton Shake & Fresh Carpet Freshener Foam Spray 500ml Quick-Drying No-Vac Formula with Essential Oils for Long-Lasting Odour Neutralising on Carpets & Upholstery x2
features: INSTANT ODOUR NEUTRALISATION: Shake & Fresh foam spray quickly eliminates unpleasant smells from carpets, rugs, upholstery, pet areas, and car interiors with its powerful 500ml formula
NO-VACUUM FORMULA: Quick-drying foam requires no vacuuming after application; simply spray onto the surface and allow to dry naturally for hassle-free freshening
MIDNIGHT JASMINE & SOFT COTTON SCENT: Infused with essential oils to deliver a long-lasting, luxurious fragrance that keeps your fabrics smelling fresh for extended periods
VERSATILE APPLICATION: Suitable for use on multiple fabric surfaces including carpets, rugs, fabric sofas, pet bedding areas, and vehicle interiors for comprehensive home freshening
CONVENIENT 500ML SIZE: Generously sized foam spray bottle provides ample product for treating large areas and multiple applications throughout your home
description: Product description Pan Aroma Shake & Fresh Carpet Freshener Foam Spray offers an effortless solution to refresh your home with the enchanting Midnight Jasmine & Soft Cotton scent. This 500ml foam spray is specifically designed to instantly neutralise unpleasant odours on carpets and upholstery, making it perfect for busy households. The innovative quick-drying formula eliminates the need for vacuuming after application—simply shake, spray, and let it dry. Infused with essential oils, this carpet freshener delivers a lasting fragrance that transforms your living spaces. Its versatile application makes it ideal for refreshing rugs, fabric sofas, pet areas, and car interiors, ensuring every corner of your home smells wonderfully clean. The convenient foam spray format provides even coverage and easy application, whilst the no-vacuum formula saves you time and effort. Whether you're tackling stubborn pet odours or simply want to maintain a fresh-smelling home, this carpet freshener offers a practical and effective solution for all your fabric refreshing needs. Ingredients Natural
